economic_notes: Attawapiskat Power Corporation and Attawapiskat Enterprises (comprised of Attawapiskat Resources Inc., Attawapiskat Limited Partnership, Attawapiskat Catering Inc., Attawapiskat Catering Limited Partnership, Attawapiskat Security Inc., Advanced Security Limited Partnership, Gord's Rental Inc., and Attawapiskat Rentals Limited Partnership) accounted for by modified equity method. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership generates revenue. Impact Benefit Agreement Trust receipts of $200,000.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED because the financial statements do not present a comparison of results for the accounting period with those originally planned (budget comparison missing), which is a departure from Canadian public sector accounting standards (Note 19). The qualification was also present in the prior year audit. Consolidated entities include Attawapiskat First Nation Band, Education Authority, Development Corporation, Maytawaywin Authority (Arena Gymnasium), and Health Services Board. Government business enterprises (Power Corporation and Attawapiskat Enterprises with 8 sub-entities) accounted for by modified equity method. Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund not recognized as revenue due to measurement uncertainty. Repayable to funding agencies of $3,469,875 unchanged from prior year.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
